---

As a User
I need to be able to list all the products in the catalog
So that I can view all the products available in the catalog

Details and Assumptions
Need a way to list all products in the catalog

Acceptance Criteria
Given I am visiting the product catalog website
When I make a call to view all the products in the catalog
Then it return a list of all the products present in the catalog
